title: Scaffold a hook that nudges agents to follow through on messages they send teammates
description: When a Teammate messages another, a hook senses it and reminds the sender to do the related follow-through (update a record, file an issue, pass a gate) driven off message content. Grounding: teammate-hook-triggers.md §4.3 (inbox store ~/.claude/teams/<team>/inboxes/<agent>.json as sense signal and async nudge channel), §3 (PostToolUse → additionalContext as the in-session nudge path), §0 (sender identity). Resolved at the sprint-4 grill: trigger on SENT messages, in the sender's session (ADR-0006). Rides the EXEC-046 plumbing; ships disabled by default. Src-First.
acceptance_criteria: Sending a teammate message triggers a follow-through nudge in the sender's session via additionalContext
The nudge names the follow-through implied by the message (record update, issue, gate)
Ships disabled by default; enabling via the toggle config activates it
fix: message-nudge.js implemented (sent-side additionalContext follow-through nudge, rules in nudge-rules.js, ships off); payload field names probed not live-confirmed — confirm against a live SendMessage payload before enabling. Gates PASS.
notes: Filed 2026-06-10 (Brooks). Exploratory; acceptance criteria set by the EXEC-043 grill/PRD.
